PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 2/18/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY DISCLOSURE WAS NOT MADE BY 2/18/05. DISCOVERY MEDICAL INFORMATION DUE BY 2/18/05, AND PRIOR DEPOSITION TO BE PROVIDED TO BERY & BERY BY 2/4/05. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
